dsl_rule.translation_notes: Trend change detected using price crossing above SMA20 (bottoming signal) combined with price above SMA50 (uptrend confirmation). Exit on trend reversal (cross below SMA20). Author did not specify exact exit, so trend-reversal logic applied. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given the pattern's focus on small moves reducing failure rates.

backtest_rule.reason: Trend change detected using price crossing above SMA20 (bottoming signal) combined with price above SMA50 (uptrend confirmation). Exit on trend reversal (cross below SMA20). Author did not specify exact exit, so trend-reversal logic applied. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given the pattern's focus on small moves reducing failure rates.

source_rule_text: Buy after the stock bottoms when trend changes; hold as price rises
